component.name: Figma Linux
component.summary: Unofficial Figma desktop client for Linux

description.p: An unofficial Figma desktop client for Linux built with Electron. Figma has no official Linux application; this wrapper delivers the full Figma web experience in a native window with desktop-only features.

ul.li: Multi-tab support — open several Figma files side by side
Local font integration — system fonts appear in Figma's font picker
Customisable keyboard shortcuts via a built-in editor
Tab hibernation — idle tabs release GPU memory automatically
Session restore — reopen your last tabs on next launch
Back / forward navigation, drag-to-reorder tabs, pinned tabs

description.p: This is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Figma, Inc.
